Bash(sqlcmd -S "DESKTOP-AE5HV6B\\SQLSERVER2022" -d erp_tvs -E -C -Q "SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS Cnt FROM dbo.ChartOfAccount WHERE CompanyId=1" -h -1 -W)

Bash(sqlcmd -S "DESKTOP-AE5HV6B\\SQLSERVER2022" -d erp_tvs -E -C -h -1 -W -Q "SELECT COLUMN_NAME+'|'+DATA_TYPE+'|'+ISNULL\(CAST\(CHARACTER_MAXIMUM_LENGTH AS varchar\),''\) FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME='ChartOfAccount' ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION")

Bash(sqlcmd -S "DESKTOP-AE5HV6B\\SQLSERVER2022" -d erp_tvs -E -C -h -1 -W -Q "SELECT 'LEVELS' ; SELECT HeadLevel, COUNT\(*\) FROM dbo.ChartOfAccount WHERE CompanyId=1 GROUP BY HeadLevel ORDER BY HeadLevel; SELECT 'DUPLICATE HEADCODES'; SELECT HeadCode, COUNT\(*\) c FROM dbo.ChartOfAccount WHERE CompanyId=1 GROUP BY HeadCode HAVING COUNT\(*\)>1 ORDER BY c DESC; SELECT 'NULL HEADCODE'; SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM dbo.ChartOfAccount WHERE CompanyId=1 AND \(HeadCode IS NULL OR HeadCode=0\)")

Bash(sqlcmd -S "DESKTOP-AE5HV6B\\SQLSERVER2022" -d erp_tvs -E -C -h -1 -W -Q "SELECT 'children count by parent \(top 15\)'; SELECT TOP 15 ParentHead, COUNT\(*\) c, MIN\(HeadCode\), MAX\(HeadCode\) FROM dbo.ChartOfAccount WHERE CompanyId=1 GROUP BY ParentHead ORDER BY c DESC")

PowerShell(& sqlcmd -S $S -d $D -E -C -W -s"|" -Q "SET NOCOUNT ON; SELECT Id, CurrencyName, Symbol, CompanyId FROM dbo.Currency ORDER BY CompanyId, Id;")
PowerShell(& sqlcmd -S $S -d $D -E -C -W -s"|" -Q "SET NOCOUNT ON; SELECT TOP 3 Id, CustomerName, BudgetLineId FROM dbo.Customer WHERE ISNULL\(BudgetLineId,0\)>0;")
PowerShell(& sqlcmd -S $S -d $D -E -C -W -s"|" -Q "SET NOCOUNT ON; SELECT TOP 3 Id, ISNULL\(ItemName,''\) AS ItemName, BudgetLineId FROM dbo.Item WHERE ISNULL\(BudgetLineId,0\)>0;")
PowerShell("`n===== NOT NULL columns \(no default\) for key tables =====")

PowerShell(& sqlcmd -S $S -d $D -E -C -W -s"|" -Q "SET NOCOUNT ON; SELECT c.name AS Col, ty.name AS Typ FROM sys.columns c JOIN sys.types ty ON ty.user_type_id=c.user_type_id WHERE c.object_id=OBJECT_ID\('dbo.ItemSet'\) ORDER BY c.column_id;")

PowerShell(& sqlcmd -S $S -d $D -E -C -W -s"|" -Q "SET NOCOUNT ON; SELECT t.name AS Tbl, c.name AS Col FROM sys.columns c JOIN sys.tables t ON t.object_id=c.object_id WHERE c.name LIKE '%ParentHead%' OR c.name LIKE '%SalesParent%';")
PowerShell("`n===== Any column LIKE %ParentHead% or %HeadCode% anywhere =====")
